links.text: So what are you for Halloween?

01.text: Rowan: Indeed! Last time I was here this building was an apothecary!

02.text: Rowan: Ah, you are too kind. my fashion is timeless really.

03.text: Rowan: I'm sure I don't understand what you mean with this 'Halloween.'

04.text: Now then, might I trouble you for a drink?
